arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard fires title warning ahead of blockbuster Arsenal-Man City clash
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard has seen his side turn on the style when the pressure is on, but they are yet to get over the line to win the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins to Arsenal transfer takes huge twist as Aston Villa forced into unwanted decision
arts.sum: Arsenal transfer target Ollie Watkins appeared to pick up an injury during Aston Villa's Premier League clash against Wolves. With one new attacking signing set to arrive, Watkins also departing is feasible but as it turns out, neither Emery or Mikel Arteta may have him available for the next few weeks.

arts.ttl: Newcastle handed harsh reminder by Fulham ahead of Arsenal home leg
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe says his side’s home defeat to Fulham is reminder they will have to be at their very best to see off Arsenal in the League Cup next week. Jacob Murphy put the Magpies in front at St James’ Park, but the visitors turned it around after the break. arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins subbed off at half-time in Aston Villa's defeat at Wolves after appearing to suffer an injury - with Arsenal target one of FOUR changes made by Unai Emery at the interval
arts.sum: Emery reacted to a sluggish performance by his team in Saturday's Premier League clash with Wolves by making four substitutions during the half-time interval.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer makes prediction for Arsenal vs Manchester City - 'Same again'
arts.sum: Arsenal welcome Manchester City to the Emirates as they look to close the gap to Liverpool in the Premier League and Alan Shearer is expecting a tense meeting between the sides

arts.ttl: Fans think Mo Salah aimed subtle Erling Haaland dig after Liverpool victory
